name: pipeline
description: Diagnose pipeline health, detect stalled deals, and surface what needs attention this week. Built for sales teams managing active opportunities.
author: dpetcr

capabilities.pipeline_diagnosis: Diagnose pipeline health and detect stalled or false-active deals
capabilities.stage_control: Enforce stage discipline and surface stage risks
capabilities.forecast_review: Assess forecast credibility and pipeline honesty
capabilities.priority_ranking: Identify the top opportunities that need attention now
